title: pattern monster
body:
i'm a pattern monster, a savage
i see em attack em like i'm famished
they scatter like light
i'm leaping back to back faster
than i can track matters
matter of fact the facts matter
but what provides the energy
can it be an mc squaring up ain't an enemy
i call it the theory of relativity
look at me out here fishing for a complement
but i forgot to hook my lines
so you're stuck eating worms
wishing for some condiments
it's kinda messed up
we 99.9 percent the same stuff
but time and space make a difference
and it's hard to send a signal to the stars
when you're still fighting wars between your parts
when there's growth to harvest there's power to harness
but when our arms get short we end up working hardest
can't ever empty our pockets
dying to die with possessions like a pharaoh
we all got mummy issues
haunting our descendants like where the fuck my chair go
put it back where i put it back when i put it back against the wall
so you remember that daddy miss you
after all after all i did you i get you
